title: resource-field-equality-block parameters
description: Parameters for generating a Rego policy that blocks a resource when a field equals a specific value.

Kind.description: Kubernetes resource kind to match (e.g., Service, Ingress)

FieldPath.description: Dot-separated path to the field on the resource (e.g., spec.type)

BlockedValue.description: The value to deny (e.g., NodePort, LoadBalancer)
